actions.name: batch_update_doc
actions.description: Apply up to thirty Tencent Docs document V3 batch update operations.

fileID.description: The Tencent Docs document file ID.

items.description: A provider-defined Tencent Docs request object.

requests.description: The Tencent Docs document batch update requests.

version.description: The document version used for optimistic concurrency.

inputSchema.description: Input for batch-updating a Tencent Docs document.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs document batch update response.

actions.name: batch_update_sheet
actions.description: Apply up to five Tencent Docs spreadsheet V3 batch update operations.

fileID.description: The Tencent Docs spreadsheet file ID.

items.description: A provider-defined Tencent Docs request object.

requests.description: The Tencent Docs spreadsheet batch update requests.

inputSchema.description: Input for batch-updating a Tencent Docs sheet.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

items.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

responses.description: The per-operation responses returned by Tencent Docs.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs spreadsheet batch update response.

actions.name: convert_file_id
actions.description: Convert between Tencent Docs fileID and encodedID values.

type.description: The conversion type. Use 1 for fileID to encodedID or 2 for encodedID to fileID.

inputSchema.description: Input for converting Tencent Docs file IDs.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

anyOf.description: The Tencent Docs file ID when converting from encodedID.
The Tencent Docs encoded ID when converting from fileID.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs file ID conversion response.

actions.name: create_file
actions.description: Create a Tencent Docs online document, sheet, form, slide, or smart sheet.

title.description: The document title. Tencent Docs limits it to 36 characters.

type.description: The Tencent Docs file type to create.

templateID.description: The Tencent Docs official template ID to use.

templateVersion.description: The template version to use. Defaults to 0.

folderID.description: The parent folder ID. Defaults to the root folder.

ext.description: The Drive plugin thumbnail type. Required only for addon documents.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Tencent Docs online file.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

ID.description: The Tencent Docs file or folder ID.

anyOf.description: The file or folder title.
The Tencent Docs file type, such as doc, sheet, form, or folder.
The browser URL for opening the file or folder.
The file or folder status returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the authorized user created the file or folder.
Whether the authorized user owns the file or folder.
The creation time returned by Tencent Docs.
The creator display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The owner display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The owner Open ID returned by Tencent Docs.
The last modification time returned by Tencent Docs.
The last modifier display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The last browse time returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the file is starred.
Whether the file is pinned.
The source classification for the file when returned by search.
The highlighted search snippet when returned by search.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

file.description: A Tencent Docs file or folder item.

actions.description: Generate the result spreadsheet for a Tencent Docs form.

inputSchema.description: Input containing a Tencent Docs form ID.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

ID.description: The Tencent Docs file or folder ID.

anyOf.description: The file or folder title.
The Tencent Docs file type, such as doc, sheet, form, or folder.
The browser URL for opening the file or folder.
The file or folder status returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the authorized user created the file or folder.
Whether the authorized user owns the file or folder.

The owner Open ID returned by Tencent Docs.
The last modification time returned by Tencent Docs.
The last modifier display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The last browse time returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the file is starred.
Whether the file is pinned.
The source classification for the file when returned by search.
The highlighted search snippet when returned by search.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current Tencent Docs user profile for the OAuth access token.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to get the current Tencent Docs user.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

openID.description: The Tencent Docs Open ID for the authorized user.

anyOf.description: The display nickname returned by Tencent Docs.
The user avatar URL returned by Tencent Docs.
The user authorization source, such as wx or qq.
The account binding source, such as wx or qq.
The developer-account scoped Tencent Docs union ID.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The current Tencent Docs user profile response.

actions.name: get_doc_content
actions.description: Get the structured content and version of a Tencent Docs document.

inputSchema.description: Input containing a Tencent Docs file ID.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

document.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs document content response.

actions.name: get_export_progress
actions.description: Check a Tencent Docs asynchronous export operation and return the download URL when ready.

exportHandle.description: The opaque export handle returned by start_export.

fileID.description: The Tencent Docs file ID being exported.

operationID.description: The export operation ID returned by start_export.

inputSchema.description: Input for checking Tencent Docs export progress. Provide exportHandle, or both fileID and operationID.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

anyOf.description: The temporary download URL when export has succeeded.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs export progress response.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

anyOf.description: The file or folder title.

actions.name: get_sheet_range
actions.description: Read cell values and metadata from a Tencent Docs spreadsheet range.

fileID.description: The Tencent Docs spreadsheet file ID.

sheetID.description: The Tencent Docs spreadsheet sheet ID.

range.description: The A1-style range to read, such as A1:D10.

inputSchema.description: Input for reading a Tencent Docs spreadsheet range.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

gridData.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs spreadsheet range response.

actions.name: list_folder
actions.description: List files and folders in a Tencent Docs folder.

folderID.description: The folder ID to list. Omit it to list the root folder.

sortType.description: The sort type, such as browse.

asc.description: The sort direction. Use 1 for ascending or 0 for descending.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Tencent Docs folder contents.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

anyOf.description: The next offset returned by Tencent Docs.

ID.description: The Tencent Docs file or folder ID.

anyOf.description: The file or folder title.
The Tencent Docs file type, such as doc, sheet, form, or folder.
The browser URL for opening the file or folder.
The file or folder status returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the authorized user created the file or folder.
Whether the authorized user owns the file or folder.
The creation time returned by Tencent Docs.
The creator display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The owner display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The owner Open ID returned by Tencent Docs.
The last modification time returned by Tencent Docs.
The last modifier display name returned by Tencent Docs.
The last browse time returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the file is starred.
Whether the file is pinned.
The source classification for the file when returned by search.
The highlighted search snippet when returned by search.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

items.description: A Tencent Docs file or folder item.
The files and folders in the folder.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tencent Docs.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs folder listing response.

actions.name: list_smartsheet_sheets
actions.description: List child sheets inside a Tencent Docs Smartsheet file.

inputSchema.description: Input containing a Tencent Docs file ID.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

sheetID.description: The Tencent Docs Smartsheet sheet ID.

anyOf.description: The sheet title returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether the sheet is visible.
The row count returned by Tencent Docs.
The column count returned by Tencent Docs.

sheets.description: The Smartsheet child sheets returned by Tencent Docs.

actions.name: rename_file
actions.description: Rename a Tencent Docs file by file ID.

title.description: The new file title. Tencent Docs limits it to 36 characters.

inputSchema.description: Input for renaming a Tencent Docs file.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

actions.name: search_files
actions.description: Search Tencent Docs files by title keyword or owner nickname.

folderID.description: The folder ID that limits the search scope.

size.description: The maximum result count. Tencent Docs allows up to 50.

asc.description: The sort direction. Use 1 for ascending or 0 for descending.

byOwnership.description: Whether to filter by files owned by the requester. Use 1 for yes or 0 for no.

fileTypes.description: A Tencent Docs file-type filter. Use hyphen-separated values for multiple types.

inputSchema.description: Input for searching Tencent Docs files.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

anyOf.description: The next offset returned by Tencent Docs.
The total matching item count returned by Tencent Docs.
Whether Tencent Docs has more search results.

anyOf.description: The file or folder title.

actions.name: start_export
actions.description: Start an asynchronous Tencent Docs file export and return the operation ID.

fileID.description: The Tencent Docs file ID to export.

exportType.description: The target export type when converting document type.

inputSchema.description: Input for starting an asynchronous Tencent Docs export.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

fileID.description: The Tencent Docs file ID being exported.

operationID.description: The Tencent Docs export operation ID.

exportHandle.description: An opaque handle that can be passed to get_export_progress.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs export submission response.

actions.name: update_form_collection_deadline
actions.description: Publish, pause, or update the collection deadline for a Tencent Docs form.

endTime.description: The collection end timestamp in seconds. Use 0 to publish without an end time.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Tencent Docs form collection deadline.

ret.description: The Tencent Docs business response code. 0 means success.

msg.description: The Tencent Docs business response message.

outputSchema.description: The Tencent Docs form deadline update response.
